failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result. It treated two prices greater than 233.90 as if they were below the minimum price, producing an incorrect answer that no items matched.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify available Mechanical Keyboard products with RGB backlight costing more than $233.90. The tool call at index 3 returned relevant evidence: two matching available RGB mechanical keyboards priced at 272.33 and 237.48, both greater than 233.90. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite conclusion, saying no items matched. This directly contradicts the tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator at index 5 reinforced the same incorrect interpretation.
